requirements.question: What do I need to become an instructor?
requirements.answer: You need professional knowledge in the field you want to teach and good communication skills.

earnings.question: How much can I earn?
earnings.answer: Instructors receive 70% of revenue from each course. Income also depends on quality and number of students.

approval.question: How long does approval take?
approval.answer: Usually 2-3 business days. We may contact you for additional information.
